name: SATCOM Telemetry Bandwidth Reduction
description: You are a UAV Communications Technician. The drone is transitioning from a high-bandwidth local link to a low-bandwidth Iridium satellite connection (SATCOM). To prevent the satellite link from saturating and dropping packets, throttle the eight MAVLink telemetry stream rates on Serial 2 (SR2_ parameters) to the target values specified in /home/ga/Documents/QGC/satcom_brief.txt. Save the updated vehicle parameters to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/satcom_link.params.
